name: budabit-community-stream
description: Community live streaming widget for BudaBit

scripts.manifest: node $(realpath node_modules/budabit-sdk/dist/manifest/cli.js) --title 'Community Stream' --type tool --app-url ${WIDGET_APP_URL:-https://example.com/budabit-community-stream/index.html} --icon ${WIDGET_ICON_URL:-https://example.com/budabit-community-stream/icon.svg} --image ${WIDGET_IMAGE_URL:-https://example.com/budabit-community-stream/icon.svg} --identifier 'community-stream' --version '0.1.0' --changelog 'Initial hosted zap.stream release' --permissions 'community:checkWriteCapabilities,community:queryLiveStreams,nostr:publish,nostr:sign,ui:toast,ui:resize' --slot-type 'community-home-before-quicklinks' --slot-label 'Community stream' --output 'dist/widget'
